## Type

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Content is accurate and sourced from authoritative references
- [ ] Both `en.md` and `zh.md` provided
- [ ] Frontmatter follows schema in `specs/002-bilingual-strategy.md`
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
